title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
